chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْقِيبِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The follow up after the Salāt and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/176)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/176)
text: هُ كَانَ يُسَبِّحُ تَسْبِيحَ فَاطِمَةَ ( صلوات الله عليها ) فَيَصِلُهُ وَ لَا يَقْطَعُهُ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, from Muhammad Bin Ja’far, from the one who mentioned it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws that heasws used to Glorify by the Glorification (Tasbīḥ) of Syeda Fatimaasws, so heasws would recite it without interruption’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from the narrator of previous Hadith from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Ya‘qub ibn Yazid from Muhammad ibn Ja‘far from those whom he has mentioned has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say Tasbih of Fatimah al-Zahra’, ‘Alayha al-Salam, continuously without interruption.”
